name: list_stories
description: List stories in a Storyblok space with powerful filtering, sorting, and pagination. Filter by content type, folder, tags, date ranges, and full-text search. Results are paginated (default 25 per page, max 100). The response includes pagination headers for total count. Useful for building content listings, search results, or content audits.

parameters.name: token
parameters.description: Your space's access token. Use the preview token for draft content or the public token for published content.

parameters.name: starts_with
parameters.description: Filter by slug prefix to get stories from a specific folder (e.g., 'blog/' for all blog posts, 'products/electronics/' for a subfolder).

parameters.name: content_type
parameters.description: Filter by component name (content type), e.g., 'blog_post', 'product', 'page'.

parameters.name: with_tag
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of tags to filter by. Returns stories matching ANY of the specified tags.

parameters.name: search_term
parameters.description: Full-text search across story names and content fields.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number for pagination. Starts at 1. Defaults to 1.

parameters.name: per_page
parameters.description: Number of stories per page. Maximum 100. Defaults to 25.

content.title: Getting Started Guide
content.excerpt: Learn how to set up your project in 5 minutes.

content.title: Advanced Tips
content.excerpt: Power user techniques for content management.
